hero.leadPre: Raad POS replaces your notebook with a smart register. Track sales, inventory, and customer credit (
hero.leadPost: ) — from one phone, with every record encrypted and backed up to the cloud.

ways.desc: Selling used to live in notebooks. Today, it lives on your phone.
ways.oldDesc: Messy notebooks. Lost receipts. Forgotten debts.
ways.newDesc: Manage, sell, and scale — all in one AI-powered platform.

how.desc: From install to first sale in under five minutes — no training required.

steps.p: Download from the Play Store — less than 30 MB.
Sign up with your email and set up your business profile.
Scan barcodes or type manually — added in seconds.
Tap items, take payment, print or text the receipt.
Real-time stock levels. Low-stock alerts. No overselling.
Record debts, link to customers, send WhatsApp reminders.
Daily, weekly, monthly — see what sold and what didn't.
Roles, permissions, and activity logs for every team member.

featureBand.p: Every sale and record is encrypted and backed up to the cloud — private and protected.
Lose your phone? No problem. Log in on a new device and everything's there.
Print to any thermal printer, or send a receipt via WhatsApp or SMS.
Earn XP for sales and referrals. Unlock higher limits — free, forever.

inside.desc: No bloat, no training manuals. Five things, done extremely well.
inside.daynTitle: Customer credit, without the paper book
inside.daynDesc: Every credit sale is linked to a customer. See who owes what, record partial payments, and send a polite WhatsApp reminder with one tap.
inside.invDesc: Every sale updates your stock in real time — with alerts before you run out.
inside.reportsDesc: Daily, weekly, and monthly summaries — what sold, what didn't.
inside.barcodeDesc: No extra hardware — your phone camera is the scanner.

business.desc: Pick your business — Raad adapts to how you actually sell.

types.name: Grocery & supermarket
types.desc: High-volume days, hundreds of small sales. Raad keeps the queue moving and the shelves counted.

types.name: Clothing & boutique
types.desc: Sizes, colors, and seasons. Track every variant and see which styles actually move.

types.name: Cosmetics & beauty
types.desc: Small items, big margins. Bundle products, watch expiry dates, and send digital receipts.

types.name: Electronics
types.desc: High-value sales need a paper trail. Record serial numbers and back every warranty with a receipt.

types.name: Bookshop & stationery
types.desc: Thousands of small SKUs and a school-season rush. Find any item in seconds.

types.name: Restaurants & cafés
types.desc: Fast orders at the counter. Quick keys for your menu, daily totals when the doors close.

pricing.desc: Try Raad Pro free for 14 days — no card required. Upgrade only when your shop outgrows the Starter plan.
pricing.starterSub: Always free — perfect for small shops just getting started.
pricing.proSub: For the smart shop owner who wants the full Raad Pro experience — and to grow.
pricing.note: Prices in USD. Cancel anytime — your data stays yours, on Starter or Pro.

items.a: Raad is an all-in-one Point of Sale app that turns your smartphone into a complete business management system. It replaces paper notebooks with a smart, secure, simple solution — track sales, inventory, customer credit (dayn), and business insights, all in one place.

items.q: How does Raad keep my data secure?
items.a: Your business data is encrypted in transit and at rest, and automatically backed up to the cloud. Only you and the staff you authorize can access it — with roles and permissions you control, so your sales, products, and customers stay private and protected.

items.q: What if my products don't have barcodes?
items.a: No problem. Add any product manually, or use your camera to scan barcodes. Perfect for shops selling both manufactured goods and local or handmade items like sambusas, crafts, or fresh produce.

items.q: How does the customer credit (dayn) feature work?
items.a: Replace your paper debt book with our Dayn Tracker. Link each credit sale to a customer, track the full transaction history, record partial payments, and send polite WhatsApp or SMS reminders with one tap — so you recover money faster.

items.q: Is my business data safe and private?
items.a: Yes — security is our top priority. All data is encrypted and backed up to the cloud. If your phone is lost or broken, just log in from a new device and your sales, products, and customers are instantly restored.

Instead of a restricted free plan, Raad rewards you for using the app. Start at Level 1 with generous limits. Earn XP by making sales and referring other shops — level up to unlock higher product, staff, and feature limits. Free, forever.

items.q: How do I print receipts for customers?
items.a: Raad connects to most Bluetooth thermal printers. After each sale, print a physical receipt, or send a digital one via WhatsApp or SMS — saving paper and giving customers flexibility.

cta.desc: Join 12,800+ shop owners using Raad to run smarter, faster businesses — every day.

footer.tagline: A smart, fast, simple point-of-sale app for small and medium businesses. Manage sales, track products, and run your shop effortlessly.
